pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release.
Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the build would target JDK 17, potentially missing JDK 21 features or failing strict compatibility checks if the build tool enforces the property against the runtime.

src/test/java/com/fwai/turtle/api/contro.general_idea: Remove unused static import of Mockito's when method.
